tasks.instruction: Create a new profile for short guitar tutorials, add 2 public guitar lesson videos from search that are each under 15 minutes, order them from shortest to longest, and publish the profile.

target_names: Intermediate Guitar Tutorial - Power Chords in 15 Minutes

expected_values.bio: Short guitar lessons for busy beginners.

tasks.instruction: In the profile that aggregates all your latest uploads, playlists, and series, use analytics for the last 7 days to pin the 3 links with the highest click counts, hide all links with 4 or fewer clicks, and set ordering so pinned links appear first followed by the newest links.

tasks.instruction: In your sandbox profile used for experimenting with themes and layouts, switch to any dark theme whose background color is at or darker than hex #333333, set the accent color to #7C3AED, use rounded buttons, choose a two-column layout on desktop with one column on mobile, enable YouTube thumbnails, and save the appearance settings.

tasks.instruction: In your central profile for channel updates, add a custom announcement link pointing to a YouTube URL, schedule it to be visible only during the first full week of May 2024 from Monday through Sunday, pin it so it appears at the top of the links list, and save.
